title: 说明模具费、开模时间和模具归属
theme: 从 mold cost / mold making / mold ownership 开始
goals: 能解释为什么新款或定制规格需要模具费
能说明开模时间、样品时间和大货时间的区别
能回答模具归属、退款政策和专属使用权等敏感问题

review.title: Day 11 复习
items: 昨天练了 price difference、raw material、margin 和 target price。
今天进入报价深化里的模具问题：模具费、开模周期、模具归属和退款政策。
客户问 mold cost 时，不要只报数字，要说明费用包含什么、什么时候支付、后续怎么安排。

preview.scenario: 客户需要一个新尺寸、新结构或定制 logo 位置，工厂需要开模；客户会问模具费为什么要收、模具是否属于他们、后续订单能不能退模具费。
needToKnow: mold cost 是模具费，不等于产品单价，也通常不包含大货费用。
mold making 是开模过程，完成后通常还要打样确认。
mold ownership 和 exclusive use 是敏感问题，需要说明公司政策，不要随便承诺。

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明新产品、新尺寸或特殊结构需要支付的模具费用。
vocabulary.example: The mold cost is 800 dollars, and it needs to be paid before mold making.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明制作新模具的过程和时间。
vocabulary.example: Mold making will take about 20 days after payment.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明模具由谁拥有、保管或使用。
vocabulary.example: We can confirm the mold ownership in the agreement.

vocabulary.usage: 用于解释模具费是否可退、什么时候退、退多少。
vocabulary.example: Please let me check our refund policy for the mold cost.

vocabulary.usage: 用于更正式地描述模具、夹具或生产工具。
vocabulary.example: The tooling cost depends on the product structure.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明模具一次能生产几个产品，影响模具费和效率。
vocabulary.example: A multi-cavity mold can improve production efficiency.

vocabulary.usage: 用于开模前确认外观、结构或尺寸的初步样件。
vocabulary.example: We can make a prototype before mold making if needed.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户要求模具只给自己使用的情况。
vocabulary.example: If you need exclusive use of the mold, we need to confirm it in writing.

sentences.label: 说明需要开模
sentences.natural: This design needs a new mold.
sentences.business: This design requires a new mold because the size and structure are different from our existing models.

sentences.label: 说明模具费
sentences.business: The mold cost is 800 dollars, and it needs to be paid before mold making.

sentences.label: 说明开模时间
sentences.natural: Mold making will take about 20 days.
sentences.business: Mold making will take about 20 days after payment and final drawing approval.

sentences.label: 解释模具归属
sentences.natural: The mold will be kept in our factory.
sentences.business: The mold will be kept in our factory for your future orders, and we can confirm the mold ownership in writing.

sentences.label: 回应退款问题
sentences.natural: The mold cost is usually not refundable.
sentences.business: The mold cost is usually not refundable, but I can check if there is any refund policy for repeat orders.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太突然，客户不知道为什么要收模具费。
chatAnalysis.better: This design needs a new mold.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: This design requires a new mold because the size and structure are different from our existing models.

chatAnalysis.problem: 缺少起算条件，客户不知道从什么时候开始算。
chatAnalysis.better: Mold making will take about 20 days.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Mold making will take about 20 days after payment and final drawing approval.

chatAnalysis.problem: 语气容易引起争议，模具归属要更正式地说明。
chatAnalysis.better: The mold will be kept in our factory.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: The mold will be kept in our factory for your future orders, and we can confirm the mold ownership in writing.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：说明为什么需要模具费

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why do we need to pay mold cost?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: This design requires a new mold because the size and structure are different from our existing models.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How much is the mold cost?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The mold cost is 800 dollars, and it needs to be paid before mold making.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：确认开模时间

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How long does mold making take?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Mold making will take about 20 days after payment and final drawing approval.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you make a sample after the mold is ready?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. After the mold is ready, we will arrange samples for your confirmation.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户问模具归属

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If we pay the mold cost, does the mold belong to us?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The mold will be kept in our factory for your future orders.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can other customers use it?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If you need exclusive use of the mold, we need to confirm it in writing before mold making.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：从模具费到开模、样品和模具归属

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, we want to make a new size for this product.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Please send us the drawing or detailed size requirement first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If we change the size, do we need a new mold?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, this design requires a new mold because the size is different from our existing models.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How much is the mold cost?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The estimated mold cost is 800 dollars, but I need to confirm it after checking the final drawing.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why is the mold cost so high?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The tooling cost depends on the product structure, size, and mold cavity.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we make a prototype first?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can make a prototype before mold making if you want to confirm the structure first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How long does the prototype take?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The prototype usually takes about 7 days after drawing approval.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: And how long does mold making take?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Mold making will take about 20 days after payment and final drawing approval.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: After the mold is ready, can you make samples?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. After the mold is ready, we will arrange samples for your confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If we pay the mold cost, does the mold belong to us?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The mold will be kept in our factory for your future orders, and we can confirm the mold ownership in writing.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can other customers use this mold?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If you need exclusive use of the mold, we need to confirm it in writing before mold making.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can the mold cost be refunded after bulk orders?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The mold cost is usually not refundable, but I can check if there is any refund policy for repeat orders.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please check the refund policy.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will check the mold cost, mold making time, ownership terms, and refund policy together.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please include all details in the quotation.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. I will include the mold cost, mold making time, sample time, and mold ownership terms in the quotation.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：这个设计需要一个新模具。
exercises.answer: This design requires a new mold.
acceptable: this design requires a new mold
this design needs a new mold
exercises.hint: requires 比 needs 更商务。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：need mold fee
exercises.answer: This design requires a new mold because the size and structure are different.
acceptable: this design requires a new mold because the size and structure are different
this design needs a new mold because the size and structure are different
exercises.hint: 先解释为什么需要模具。

exercises.prompt: 填空：Mold making will take about 20 days after payment and final drawing ____.
exercises.hint: drawing approval 表示图纸确认。

exercises.prompt: 客户问模具是否属于他们，哪个回复更适合？
options: The mold will be kept in our factory for your future orders, and we can confirm the mold ownership in writing.
exercises.answer: The mold will be kept in our factory for your future orders, and we can confirm the mold ownership in writing.
acceptable: the mold will be kept in our factory for your future orders and we can confirm the mold ownership in writing
exercises.hint: 模具归属要正式、稳妥地说明。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：模具费通常不可退。
exercises.answer: The mold cost is usually not refundable.
acceptable: the mold cost is usually not refundable
mold cost is usually not refundable
exercises.hint: not refundable 表示不可退款。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Can other customers use this mold? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: If you need exclusive use of the mold, we need to confirm it in writing before mold making.
acceptable: if you need exclusive use of the mold we need to confirm it in writing before mold making
if you need exclusive use we need to confirm it in writing before mold making
exercises.hint: exclusive use 表示专属使用。

homework: 把 mold cost、mold making、mold ownership、tooling、exclusive 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍。
跟读长对话 2 遍，重点练模具费、开模时间和模具归属说明。
tomorrow: Day 13 会练样品确认、修改和大货前批准。
